---
title: "STA 9750 - Yashvi Mittal"
---

# About Me

Hi! I'm **Yashvi Mittal**, a student at Baruch College taking STA 9750
(Software Tools for Data Analysis) in Spring 2026. This site collects my
coursework and mini-projects for the semester.

## A first R block

Just to confirm the site renders R code correctly:

```{r}
#| label: first-chunk
#| echo: true

x <- 1:10
mean(x)
```

```{r}
#| label: simple-plot
#| fig-cap: "A simple plot to confirm graphics render."

plot(1:10, (1:10)^2, type = "b",
     xlab = "x", ylab = "x squared",
     main = "Hello, Quarto!")
```
